generated_oml:
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensors in the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed sensors in the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSpeedData
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load sensors measuring weight on the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadData
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneSpeedSensor
]

instance CraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

instance CranePositionDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data records from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CraneSpeedDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Speed data records from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CraneLoadDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Load data records from gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneLoadData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for dissemination of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization dashboards for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message queuing for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for control and simulation logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling for physical crane structure design"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture design using Arcadia models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware controller interfacing for physical crane control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for real-time system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for persistent operational records"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for interactive monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model fidelity against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system optimization insights for control"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Persistent operational records for historical analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of crane state"
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of model fidelity against physical system behavior"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams to describe the software architecture of the system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the lab-scale gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance ResearchLaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled research laboratory environment for the physical crane system, public availability for reproducible experimentation"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, CraneController
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dedicated controller for the physical crane system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute control commands on the physical crane, with operator configurations and controls provided through the Human Machine Interface (HMI)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams. Components include InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker, and virtualization/containerization technologies for deployment. Microsoft Azure tools are used for cloud-based pipeline implementation in the Air Quality Management exemplar, while the Lab Scale Gantry Crane utilizes C4 Model to structure its cyber-physical system architecture."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT over a local network on a single personal computer. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are containerized with Docker, while other components run as native processes. Network topology details, bandwidth/latency requirements, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer. Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are containerized with Docker, while other components (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service) run as native processes. No cloud, edge, or scalability mechanisms beyond single-host deployment are mentioned in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via ActiveMQ message broker for data exchange, Microsoft Azure services for cloud infrastructure, and AutomationML standards for model interoperability. GreenhouseDT uses InfluxDB for time-series data storage and virtual machines for deployment, while the Air Quality Management exemplar implements its digital twin pipeline using Azure tools."
]
